name: SoftJunk Custom Sequence Preview
before_payment_action: Build the one-copy order packet first, then use PayPal after the packet.

no_clone_checkout_proof.label: No-clone checkout proof
no_clone_checkout_proof.payment_boundary: This proves the executable checkout route only. Do not claim paid, started, delivered, fulfilled, complete, received, or stopped unless seller-side PayPal evidence exists or the verifier returns PAYPAL_PAYMENT_VERIFIED=true.

purpose: Generate a free custom lead follow-up preview, a shareable order link, a one-copy order packet handoff, and a PayPal note before the buyer uses the after-packet payment handoff for the full 7-day sequence.
paid_sequence_adds: Final copy tuned to one business and lead context
paypal_note_template: Custom Sequence Preview | Business: [business] | Service: [service] | Source: [source] | Tone: [tone] | Need: [blocker] | Next: [next] | Value: [value]
privacy_rule: Do not put customer names, phone numbers, addresses, private customer details, or PayPal transaction details in public URLs.
buyer_agent_instruction: Generate the free preview first. If the buyer wants the full custom sequence, build the one-copy order packet at https://trungcodeer.github.io/softjunk-lead-kit/fix-one-quiet-lead.html, run the no-clone checkout command, compare the release SHA-256, verify the after-packet payment URL is https://paypal.me/softjunk/5USD for 5.00 USD, then copy the after-packet PayPal URL from the packet handoff. Do not claim payment or fulfillment until PAYPAL_PAYMENT_VERIFIED=true or seller-side PayPal proof exists.
fulfillment_rule: Do not mark the order paid, started, delivered, fulfilled, complete, received, or stopped unless the seller can see the 5 USD PayPal transaction, the API verifier returns PAYPAL_PAYMENT_VERIFIED=true, or a trusted seller-side PayPal CSV export returns PAYPAL_PAYMENT_VERIFIED=true source=csv.
